description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request to the master branch and on push events to all branches except master and tags not matching v*. Run four jobs in parallel: test_ubuntu on ubuntu-latest, test_windows on windows-2019, test_macos on macos-latest, and test_flatpak in a Flatpak container. Each job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, and runs build and test scripts.
